title: IMDB Is Funny
wikitext:
[]: IMDB Is Funny             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu May 15, 2008 3:54 pm You ever look at their page for the Live Action Eva movie? It's funny. Two wannabe (possibly one) filmmakers have posted themselves as the writers, directors, and editors of the film even though they have no credentials, previous experience or proof. Even funnier is the Musicians they have on the film- Yo-yo-Ma Vangelis YANNI!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu May 15, 2008 4:01 pm yes, and the Webuild 1.0 was released in the US on Feb. 22 I remember seeing it on opening weekend, it had already been DUBBED too

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Thu May 15, 2008 10:03 pm Huh, I thought Vangelis was, like, dead . Apparently I was mistaken.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri May 16, 2008 5:10 am You mean it's IMDb and there isn't 1000 threads about how pretentious and overrated it is?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri May 16, 2008 10:58 am Funnily enough IMDB gangs tend to really like Evangelion and other of Anno's works - there are many, honestly good, review burning with awe ...that's not to say such posts are non-existent Still, IMDB is IMDB

[]:             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Sun May 18, 2008 3:59 am Ah, IMDB ... what can I say? It's just like Wikipedia, except even less moderated.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun May 18, 2008 8:41 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: You mean it's IMDb and there isn't 1000 threads about how pretentious and overrated it is?
